prompt: 詩篇 46:10 「你們要休息」的希伯來文原意是什麼？

assertions.text: Identifies harpu from root raphah with Hifil imperative form
Notes Psalm 46 military context (wars, kingdoms, weapons)
Does NOT call it exclusively a 'military command' (presents semantic range)
Contrasts with common devotional reading while noting the range
